mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (post_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET like_count = #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE post_id = #{postId}
